textByHash.0ec898443d40ab4e0a44b63f6fa9be520c9a9b2e: I'll never turn down free food! I just hope it tastes good!
textByHash.c73843fe659165ac30118388311eca029a0e3b68: Don't overdo the spice! You want to make sure there's less spice than there is salad.
textByHash.e5f36d0e3947d456e138e0ddeef43d49cdc35b87: I think I deserve a lifetime supply of these kebabs for helping to get things started.
